name: CBSA Assessment and Revenue Management (CARM)
evidence_role: commercial importer duty and tax account workflow

name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.

name: CBSA Customs Tariff 2026
claim_boundary: Reference source only; classification and tariff treatment require qualified review.

name: CFIA Automated Import Reference System (AIRS)
claim_boundary: Reference source only; product-specific food import compliance requires qualified review and source verification.

name: Global Affairs Canada Import Controls and Import Permits
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove whether a specific product requires an import permit.

name: Justice Laws Import Control List
claim_boundary: Reference source only; legal interpretation and product applicability require qualified review.

name: Global Affairs Canada Consolidated Canadian Autonomous Sanctions List
claim_boundary: Reference source only; screening results require dated search records and reviewer signoff.

name: ISED Trade Data Online
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove market size, buyer demand, or revenue.

name: Canadian Importers Database
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove buyer validation, supplier fit, customs advice, or freshness of a specific product row.

name: CBSA Licensed Customs Brokers
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a broker relationship, review, or signoff.
